events.title: Act I - The Anomaly
events.summary: Ada experiences a direct perceptual rupture, verifies a matching instrumentation anomaly, and crosses the threshold from skepticism to investigation.

events.title: Act II - The Archive Hunt
events.summary: Ada follows mythic and historical rhymes, discovers the Edgar Potter corpus, and realizes that the hidden model predates her by decades.

events.title: Act III - The Man Who Died Twice
events.summary: Ada's leak triggers OPI pursuit. The hunt for Potter turns into a race where each clue costs credibility, safety, and trust.

events.title: Act IV - The First Convergence
events.summary: Potter provides the operational model. Ada and allies execute a constrained resonance test and achieve first direct perception of the Yggdrasil/Arboros structure.

events.title: Static in the Sky
events.summary: A normal workday cadence breaks when Ada notices a subtle atmospheric distortion that feels wrong before it can be measured.
